parameters.name: prompt
parameters.description: Execute a prompt in non-interactive mode. Codex runs the prompt and exits when done.

parameters.name: model [optional]
parameters.description: Set the LLM model to use. Empty means use the Codex CLI default or config.

parameters.name: update-codex [optional]
parameters.description: Update the Codex CLI tool before use.
parameters.help_text: Update the Codex CLI tool before use.
